features.name: Example: User authentication
features.description: Email + password login with JWT session tokens, password reset flow via email
features.evidence: L1: tsc clean (commit a3f2c1) + ruff check passed; L2: pytest tests/test_auth.py 12/12 passed (.agent/evidence/test-output-2026-05-10.txt); L3: manual login + reset flow verified in staging (screenshot: .agent/evidence/auth-flow.png)

features.name: Example: Document upload
features.description: Accept PDF and DOCX uploads up to 50MB, store in S3, return signed URL

features.name: Example: Document indexing
features.description: After upload, split document into chunks, generate embeddings, store in vector DB

features.name: Example: Email notifications
features.description: Send transactional emails for signup, password reset, indexing completion
features.evidence: Blocked by PROBLEMS.md #3: SMTP credentials rotation required, ops team has not provided new ones yet. Asked 2026-05-08.
